query_title: In This Corner of the World

recommendations.title: WILL
recommendations.overview: Two young police officers find themselves torn between collaboration and resistance as they navigate the Nazi-occupied Antwerp during World War II.

recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Grave of the Fireflies
recommendations.overview: In the final months of World War II, 14-year-old Seita and his sister Setsuko are orphaned when their mother is killed during an air raid in Kobe, Japan. After a falling out with their aunt, they move into an abandoned bomb shelter. With no surviving

recommendations.title: Barefoot Gen
recommendations.overview: A story about the effect of the atomic bombing of Hiroshima on a boy's life and the lives of the Japanese people.

recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: Lee
recommendations.overview: The true story of photographer Elizabeth "Lee" Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Aftermath
recommendations.overview: In the aftermath of World War II, a British colonel and his wife are assigned to live in Hamburg during the post-war reconstruction, but tensions arise with the German widower who lives with them.

recommendations.title: Pieces of a Woman
recommendations.overview: When a young mother's home birth ends in unfathomable tragedy, she begins a year-long odyssey of mourning that fractures relationships with loved ones in this deeply personal story of a woman learning to live alongside her loss.

recommendations.title: Sgt. Stubby: An American Hero
recommendations.overview: The true story of the most decorated dog in American military history - Sgt. Stubby - and the enduring bonds he forged with his brothers-in-arms in the trenches of World War I.
